raw_input.title: Desarrollador de Python
raw_input.job_html_or_text: Python developer role. Minimum 4 years. Backend development and REST APIs. FastAPI, Django or Flask. SQL databases such as PostgreSQL or MySQL. Git and Agile. Docker and cloud are valuable.

profile.base_cv_text: Backend Python/Django/FastAPI/PostgreSQL engineer with 4+ years, REST APIs, AWS, Docker and product delivery.

human_review_notes: Reviewed real case: central requirements align closely with profile.
